form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week-and-a-half. Lacklustre first-up performance when 9th (10m Fr3) over 2180m at Stawell, beaten 45 m by Kamaran (2:51.00) in No NR on April 3 at $101. Not doing enough.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing second behind Champagnes at Maryborough over 2190m in a NR 37 to 41 on March 30 at $4.60.
